3189600.name: Sorelle Soundtrack
3189600.description:
The official soundtrack for Sorelle encapsulates feelings of warmth and childlike wonder during summertime in a seaside town. Embark on a whimsical quest listening to this magical soundtrack filled with beautiful melodies and motifs highlighting each town's location and sister.

Music Directed and composed by Tan Onwiman. Additional Composition by Sunyou Kim & Jasmine Liao
